3055790.name: Rocket Wrestling Entertainment
3055790.description:
Rocket Jumping meets professional Wrestling in Rocket Wrestling Entertainment! Combine rocket powered leaps with over the top Takedowns to dominate your opponents and become the champion in 4 player free for all!

Fast Paced Rocket Jumping!

Dominate the arena with your movement prowess. Engage with a deep and satisfying movement system that is both easy to learn but hard to master. Pull off crazy stunts and bamboozle the competition

Energize the Crowd with Takedowns!

Unleash powerful wrestling inspired abilities to eliminate your opponents. Slam your opponents into the ground! Unleash a flurry of kicks! Throw your opponents out of the arena!

Customize your Wrestler!

Create your own loadout and choose from a multitude of Rocket Launchers, Takedowns, and Passives! Want to maintain full airtime? You can do that. Want to move faster than speed of sound? You can do that. Want to light yourself on fire and throw yourself at opponents? Not advised but you can do that. There is a playstyle for everyone in RWE.
3055790.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
